path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 25px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linejoin: round;

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 25px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linejoin: round;

line.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 25px;
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 25px;
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 25px;
